name: Diana's Secret Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in order listed.
2. Do not rehydrate the dehydrated onion.
3. If you do not have dehydrated onion, substitute with minced fresh onion and reduce the amount accordingly based on the flavor of the onion used.
4. Refrigerate mixture for at least 2 hours.
5. Optional: Form the spread into a ball and roll in nuts (pecans, walnuts, etc.). Most people in the family are allergic to nuts, so omit this step.
